NIMBLE_IMPORTER.DialogHint: Select a JSON file exported from the Nimble RPG web app.
NIMBLE_IMPORTER.ErrorInvalidJson: The selected file is not valid JSON.
NIMBLE_IMPORTER.ErrorBatchNotSupported: Batch import not supported. Please import one character at a time.
NIMBLE_IMPORTER.ErrorIncomplete: This character is not complete. Please finish building it in the web app first.
NIMBLE_IMPORTER.ErrorSkillPoints: Character has unspent skill points. Please finish building it in the web app first.
NIMBLE_IMPORTER.ErrorSystemNotActive: The Nimble game system must be active to use this importer.
NIMBLE_IMPORTER.WarnItemNotFound: Could not find "{name}" in {pack} compendium. Skipped.
NIMBLE_IMPORTER.WarnExtraSchool: Extra spell school "{name}" could not be set automatically. Please configure it on the character sheet.
NIMBLE_IMPORTER.WarnSaveBonus: Ancestry save bonus ({stat}) could not be set automatically. Please configure it on the character sheet.
NIMBLE_IMPORTER.ErrorNoFile: Please select a JSON file first.
NIMBLE_IMPORTER.ErrorUnexpected: An unexpected error occurred during import. Check the console for details.
